params.name: Ra's Solar Barque
params.description: Manjet, also known as the Ship of Eternity, belongs to the ancient Egyptian sun god Ra. This magnificent solar barque, crafted from pure gold, shines with an intense and brilliant light akin to the midday sun. Its hull is embedded with gems and ivory, and the prow is adorned with an eagle head, symbolizing Heryshaf, representing strength, protection, and foresight. The stern is adorned with a serpent totem, representing Apis, symbolizing rebirth and eternity. The entire solar barque is like a mo …
